selected_planner_requirements.evidence: workspace.html, workspace.js, and workspace.css now provide the canonical authenticated app route foundation.
Workspace sign-in, session restore, role-aware dashboard load, and sign-out call the real auth APIs.
Workspace evidence link/file forms call the real evidence APIs; upload route rejects unsupported file types before provider calls.
Generated public/stakeholder output was rebuilt and stakeholder CTAs now point to workspace.html instead of internal alpha QA.

login_status.starting_status: Auth APIs and internal account smoke existed, but no canonical protected workspace route was designated for users.
login_status.ending_status: Canonical workspace route can sign in through /api/auth/login, restore session through /api/auth/me, render role-aware sections, and sign out through /api/auth/logout.
remaining_blockers: Route-level browser smoke against a running Pages dev/server target still needed.
Pilot account lifecycle, invitation/import, password reset, credential rotation, and broader denial-state tests remain incomplete.

upload_status.starting_status: Drive upload/download APIs and internal account smoke existed, but the canonical student-facing workspace was not wired to upload.
upload_status.ending_status: Workspace can submit evidence links and file uploads through the real submission evidence APIs; unsupported file types are rejected server-side before provider calls.
remaining_blockers: Real Google Drive upload/download requires configured Cloudflare Pages Drive secrets.
Live hosted verification requires CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN for this local non-interactive session.

allowed_remaining_references: Internal-only alpha.html/account.html/account.js QA and smoke language
Legitimate curriculum terms such as debugging and wireframes

validation.notes: 3/3 workspace tests passed after removing a placeholder attribute caught by the first attempt.
17/17 upload/download tests passed after updating the large-upload fixture to an allowed PDF type.
Rebuilt public-companion output from root source.
Rebuilt both stakeholder review outputs from source.
Public companion and stakeholder outputs match deterministic source expectations.
3 site roots and manifest pages are present.
91 production text surfaces scanned after adding workspace/public CSS assets to the checker.
Production route inventory is up to date after regeneration.
Static Wrangler/D1 config passed; live Cloudflare verification reported LIVE_CLOUDFLARE_BLOCKED_NO_TOKEN.
Aggregate check passed with 122 tests, production/generated checks, typecheck, production-surface CSS coverage, and static Cloudflare verification; live Cloudflare remained blocked by missing token.

live_cloudflare_status.blocker_message: LIVE_CLOUDFLARE_BLOCKED_NO_TOKEN: Cloudflare live verification blocked because CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN is not set.

files_changed_summary: public/stakeholder source generators and generated output
non-Figma max-pass automation prompt and automation selector/report docs
next_best_passes: Run browser smoke against workspace.html through a local Pages dev target and verify sign-in, role sections, link evidence, file upload blocked state, and sign-out.
Broaden workspace role/scope tests for student-own, mentor-assigned, program teacher, admin, misc-admin, disabled/reset-required, missing assignment, and permission denied states.
Configure/verify Drive secrets in Cloudflare and run real workspace upload/download against the evidence root folder.
Deepen teacher review and mentor presentation states inside workspace.html instead of app-preview/alpha surfaces.
Expand public guide no-hidden-core-content coverage across every route.
